text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: We're here, Trainer! We're really here!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
A once-in-a-lifetime test of fate! An epic race!
Winner takes all!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I gotta go in with everything I've got! After all, I'm
taking on Grass and Suzuka here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd is totally packed. The fans are so
enthusiastic, you wouldn't believe it was a G2.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Let me hear it, Trainer! Who's the number one
Umamusume?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Who's gonna blow Suzuka out of the water and
advance to the Japan Cup?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Bueno! I'm off to the paddock!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Let's have a good race today, Suzuka! I... I'm...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm aiming high enough to see the whole world! So
whatever it is you're aiming for, I plan to go
higher!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I see... Well, let's do our best. But...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'm not really aiming for anything. I just want to
see a view with no one else in sight...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
El, she's our competitor. We are looking at things
from a different perspective.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite each racer having different goals, the
course and distance that lay before them remains
the same. Only one can claim victory!
